table_summary: Валютын арилжааны хэлцлийн дэлгэрэнгүй мэдээллийг агуулсан харагдац. Спот, форвард, своп зэрэг бүх төрлийн валютын хэлцлүүдийг хамарна. Swap хэлцлүүд (IS_SWAP=1) олон мөртэй байж болох бөгөөд LEG_NUMBER-ээр ялгагдана (1=near leg, 2=far leg). Хэлцлийн тодорхойлолт, харилцагч, нөхцөл зэрэг мэдээллийг агуулна. (A comprehensive view of FX trading deals executed by the bank. Includes SPOT, FORWARD, and SWAP transactions. Each row represents one deal or one leg of a deal. Swap transactions may contain multiple rows distinguished by LEG_NUMBER. Use this to understand deal definitions, counterparties, and deal terms. For daily swap balances, use FX_SWAP_BALANCE_DETAIL.)

column_descriptions.deal_code: Хэлцлийн дугаар (Deal Code). The unique identifier for the FX deal. **This is the primary key for joining FX data.** Used to link with FX_SWAP_BALANCE_DETAIL for swap deals. Sample values: 'SWSP20082800001', 'SPOT20082800023', 'SWFR20082800002'.
column_descriptions.is_swap: Swap хэлцэл эсэх (Is Swap). Flag indicating if this is a swap transaction. **CRITICAL for filtering.** 0=Swap биш (Not swap), 1=Swap хэлцэл (Swap deal). **Only IS_SWAP=1 deals have daily balance entries in FX_SWAP_BALANCE_DETAIL.** Non-swap deals do NOT have daily balances or interest accruals. Sample values: 0, 1.
column_descriptions.cust_code: Харилцагчийн дугаар (Customer Code). The unique identifier for the counterparty institution. Sample values: '9360000005', '9360000049'.
column_descriptions.acnt_code: Дансны дугаар (Account Code). The account code associated with this deal. Used for settlement and accounting. Sample values: '3600007179', 'MN700036003600009315'.
column_descriptions.customer_name: Харилцагчийн нэр (Customer Name). The name of the counterparty institution. **Use UPPER() for case-insensitive matching.** Sample values: 'FCC SECURITIES B.V.', 'МОНГОЛ БАНК', 'ХААН БАНК'.
column_descriptions.prod_code: Бүтээгдэхүүний код (Product Code). The code identifying the type of FX product. Sample values: '61050301', '61050210', '61050209'.
column_descriptions.prod_name: Бүтээгдэхүүний нэр (Product Name). The descriptive name of the FX product. Sample values: 'СПОТ АРИЛЖАА', 'СВОП АРИЛЖАА-БОДИТ /1 ЖИЛ ДЭЭШ ХУГАЦААТАЙ/', 'ФОРВАРД АРИЛЖАА-БОДИТ БУС /3 САР - 1 ЖИЛ ХҮРТЭЛХ/'.
column_descriptions.control_center_name: Хяналтын төвийн нэр (Control Center Name). The control center responsible for the deal. Sample values: 'МУХБ - НӨӨЦ УДИРДЛАГА'.
column_descriptions.description: Нэмэлт тайлбар (Description). Additional description or notes about the deal.
column_descriptions.dealer_id: Диллерын код (Dealer ID). The employee ID of the dealer who executed the deal. Sample values: '10510', '10097'.
column_descriptions.dealer_name: Диллерын нэр (Dealer Name). The name of the dealer who executed the trade. **Use UPPER() for case-insensitive matching.** Sample values: 'ДАГМЭДМАА', 'ӨЛЗИЙСАЙХАН'.
column_descriptions.prod_type: Бүтээгдэхүүний төрөл (Product Type). The type of FX product. **Use for filtering by deal type.** Sample values: 'SPOT' (Спот), 'FORWARD' (Форвард).
column_descriptions.sub_type: Дэд төрөл (Sub Type). The sub-type of the FX product for more granular classification. Sample values: 'SPOTTODAY', 'SPOTDATOMORROW', 'SPOTTOMORROW'.
column_descriptions.step_id: Алхмын дугаар (Step ID). The current step number in the deal workflow. Sample values: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6.
column_descriptions.step_name: Алхмын нэр (Step Name). The name of the current workflow step. Sample values: 'ХЭЛЦЛИЙН БҮРТГЭЛ', 'ЭХЛҮҮЛЭХ', 'ХЭЛЦЛИЙН БАТАЛГАА', 'ТӨЛБӨРИЙН ДААЛГАВАР', 'ТӨЛБӨР', 'ХЭЛЦЛИЙН ХААЛТ'.
column_descriptions.trco_id: Оролцогч талын дугаар (Counterparty ID). Internal identifier for the counterparty in the deal. Sample values: 2, 3, 4, 6, 7, 14.
column_descriptions.office_name: Оффисын нэр (Office Name). Front or Back office designation. Sample values: 'Front', 'Back'.
column_descriptions.deal_date: Хэлцэл хийсэн огноо (Deal Date). The date when the deal was executed/created. Sample values: '2025-01-15', '2025-02-01'.
column_descriptions.buy_sell: Арилжааны төрөл (Buy/Sell). The direction of the trade from the bank's perspective. **S=Зарсан (Sold/Bank sells), B=Худалдаж авсан (Bought/Bank buys).** Sample values: 'S', 'B'.
column_descriptions.buy_sell_name: Арилжааны төрлийн нэр (Buy/Sell Name). The descriptive name of the trade direction.
column_descriptions.acnt_status: Дансны төлөв (Account Status). The current status of the associated account. Sample values: 'O' (Open/Нээлттэй), 'C' (Closed/Хаагдсан), 'N' (New/Шинэ), 'D' (Deleted/Устгагдсан).
column_descriptions.deal_status: Хэлцлийн төлөв (Deal Status). **CRITICAL for filtering active deals.** C=Хаагдсан (Closed), D=Цуцалсан (Cancelled), SF=Төлөлт дууссан (Settlement Finished), SS=Төлөлт эхэлсэн (Settlement Started), S=Эхэлсэн (Started), N=Шинэ (New). **For active deals use: deal_status NOT IN ('C', 'D').** Sample values: 'N', 'S', 'SS', 'SF', 'C', 'D'.
column_descriptions.buy_amount: Худалдаж авсан дүн (Buy Amount). The amount being purchased. The currency is specified in buy_cur_code. Sample values: 1000000.0, 50000000.0.
column_descriptions.buy_cur_code: Худалдаж авсан валют (Buy Currency). The currency code being purchased. Sample values: 'USD', 'EUR', 'MNT', 'CNY'.
column_descriptions.buy_rate: Худалдаж авах валютын ханш (Buy Rate). The exchange rate for the buy currency. Sample values: 3450.0, 3720.0.
column_descriptions.sell_amount: Зарсан дүн (Sell Amount). The amount being sold. The currency is specified in sell_cur_code. Sample values: 3450000000.0, 186000000.0.
column_descriptions.sell_cur_code: Зарах валют (Sell Currency). The currency code being sold. Sample values: 'MNT', 'USD', 'EUR'.
column_descriptions.sell_rate: Зарах валютын ханш (Sell Rate). The exchange rate for the sell currency. Sample values: 1.0, 3450.0.
column_descriptions.deal_rate: Хэлцлийн ханш (Deal Rate). The deal exchange rate calculated as buy_rate / sell_rate or sell_rate / buy_rate depending on direction. Sample values: 3450.0, 0.00029.
column_descriptions.buy_date: Худалдаж авах талын валютлах огноо (Buy Value Date). The settlement date for the buy side. Sample values: '2025-01-17', '2025-03-15'.
column_descriptions.sell_date: Зарах талын валютлах огноо (Sell Value Date). The settlement date for the sell side. Sample values: '2025-01-17', '2025-03-15'.
column_descriptions.profit_loss: Ашиг, алдагдал (Profit/Loss). The profit or loss from the deal, calculated from the difference between deal_rate and market_rate. Positive = profit, Negative = loss. Sample values: 5000000.0, -250000.0, 0.
column_descriptions.market_rate: Зах зээлийн ханш (Market Rate). The current market exchange rate for comparison with deal_rate. Sample values: 3455.0, 3440.0.
column_descriptions.margin: Маржин (Margin). The profit margin added on top of the base/market rate. Calculated as difference between deal_rate and market_rate depending on buy/sell direction. Sample values: 5.0, -10.0.
column_descriptions.swap_give_int: Swap өгөх хүү (Swap Give Interest). Interest amount to be paid on swap transaction. Only applicable for IS_SWAP=1. Sample values: 150000.0, 0.
column_descriptions.swap_take_int: Swap авах хүү (Swap Take Interest). Interest amount to be received on swap transaction. Only applicable for IS_SWAP=1. Sample values: 200000.0, 0.
column_descriptions.comb_code: Комбинацын код (Combination Code). Code for spot-forward combination deals. Sample values: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6.
column_descriptions.comb_code_name: Комбинацын нэр (Combination Name). Name of the combination type. Sample values: 'СПОТ-ФОРВАРД ХОСЛОЛ /3САР ХҮРТЭЛХ-БОДИТ/', 'СПОТ-ФОРВАРД ХОСЛОЛ /1ЖИЛ ДЭЭШ-БОДИТ/'.
column_descriptions.point: Пойнт (Point). Point value for the deal.
column_descriptions.profitable_side: Ашиг буух тал (Profitable Side). Indicates which side of the deal is profitable. B=Buy side, S=Sell side, N=Neither/Neutral. Sample values: 'B', 'S', 'N'.
column_descriptions.pair1: Валютын хос 1 (Currency Pair 1). First currency in the trading pair. Sample values: 'USD', 'EUR'.
column_descriptions.pair2: Валютын хос 2 (Currency Pair 2). Second currency in the trading pair. Sample values: 'MNT', 'USD'.
column_descriptions.swap_code: Swap хэлцлийн дугаар (Swap Code). If this is a swap deal (IS_SWAP=1), this is the swap identifier linking related legs. NULL for non-swap deals. Sample values: 'SWAP20082800001', NULL.
column_descriptions.last_reval_date1: Сүүлд үнэлгээ хийсэн огноо (Last Revaluation Date). The date of the most recent revaluation/mark-to-market. Sample values: '2025-01-31', NULL.
column_descriptions.leg_number: Хөлийн дугаар (Leg Number). **For swap deals: 1=near leg (ойрын хөл), 2=far leg (холын хөл).** NULL for non-swap deals. Near leg settles first, far leg settles later. Sample values: 1, 2, NULL.
column_descriptions.swap_acnt_code: Swap дансны дугаар (Swap Account Code). Account code specifically for the swap transaction. Sample values: '3600007179', NULL.
